## Getting help

1. Check [docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md](docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md)
2. Search [existing issues](https://github.com/MiMindMendinc/neural-blitz-ng/issues)
3. Open a [bug report](https://github.com/MiMindMendinc/neural-blitz-ng/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)

## Security issues

Do **not** open public issues for vulnerabilities. See [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).

## Michigan MindMend Inc.

Neural Blitz NG is maintained by Michigan MindMend Inc. for practical, local-first infrastructure operators.
